name: schema-default-value
description: The structured default value for a semantic schema member.

aiGuidance.purpose: Captures the concrete JSON default value for a schema member, distinct from prose documentation of defaults on ordinary spec fields.
aiGuidance.extraction: Use this only for schema-member defaults. Store the exact JSON value when there is a concrete default. If the source says 'absent means X' rather than defining a concrete value, document that in notes or semantic-purpose instead of inventing a JSON default.
